=== ROUND 2 ===

Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Satyr — Unarmored Caster with Greatclub: [d20:20+6=26 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 24 damage. Satyr — Unarmored Caster HP: 43/67
→ Satyr — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 11 vs DC 12]

Frost Giant attacks Satyr — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:9+9=18 vs AC 15] HIT! 22 damage. Satyr — Unarmored Caster HP: 21/67
Frost Giant attacks Satyr — Unarmored Caster with Greataxe: [d20:18+9=27 vs AC 15] HIT! 21 damage. Satyr — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
